name: Synthesize
desc: Gain +1 [img:int] at the start of each turn.

name: Synthesize2
desc:
Gain +1 [img:int] at the start of each turn.
Your spells cost 25% less mana.

name: ForceField
desc: At the start of every third turn, gain +1 [img:divineshield].

name: ForceField2
desc: At the start of every other turn, gain +1 [img:divineshield].

name: SplashDamage
desc: Your basic attack deals 2 Magic splash damage.

name: SplashDamage2
desc: +2 Range. Your basic attack deals 2 Magic splash damage in a wide area.

name: BurningPaws
desc: Your basic action inflicts Burn 1.

name: BurningPaws2
desc: Your basic action inflicts Burn 3.

name: LightningPaws
desc: Your basic attack deals +1 Electric Damage and has a 10% chance to Stun.

name: LightningPaws2
desc: Your basic attack deals +2 Electric Damage and has a 33% chance to Stun.

name: IcePaws
desc: Your basic attack deals Ice Damage, inflicts Slow 1, and has a 15% chance to Freeze.

name: IcePaws2
desc: Your basic attack deals Ice Damage, inflicts Slow 2, and has a 50% chance to Freeze.

name: PawMissile
desc:
Your basic attack is Magic Missile.
(its damage scales with [img:int]).

name: PawMissile2
desc:
Your basic attack is Magic Missile.
(its damage scales with [img:int]).
Emit 4 Sparkles when you use your basic attack.

name: Overload
desc: When you cast a spell, deal 1 random elemental damage to adjacent tiles.

name: Overload2
desc: When you cast a spell, deal 2 tri-elemental damage to adjacent tiles.

name: ChargeUp
desc: If you end your turn with 0 mana, the next spell you cast is free

name: ChargeUp2
desc: If you end your turn with 0 mana, gain +1 Magic Damage and the next spell you cast is free.

name: DeathChill
desc: When downed, Freeze all enemies and the rest of the map.

name: DeathChill2
desc: When downed, Freeze all enemies and the rest of the map, and full heal all allies.

name: Epiphany
desc: +5 starting mana. +5 Mana Regeneration  Lose all unspent mana at the end of each of your turns

name: Epiphany2
desc: +20 starting mana. +5 Mana Regeneration  Lose all unspent mana at the end of each of your turns

name: Three
desc: Every 3rd spell you cast in a turn is cast twice.

name: Three2
desc: The first spell and every 3rd spell you cast is cast twice.

name: FireAspect
desc:
Fire immunity.
Inflict Burn 1 on units that contact you.
Your Fire element damage is increased by 1 and inflicts +1 Burn.

name: FireAspect2
desc:
Fire immunity.
Inflict Burn 3 on units that contact you.
Your Fire element damage is increased by 2 and inflicts +3 Burn.

name: IceAspect
desc:
Ice immunity. You can damage frozen units.
Units that contact you take 1 Ice Damage, Slow 2, and have a 5% chance to Freeze.

name: IceAspect2
desc:
+2 Brace. Ice immunity. You can damage frozen units.
Units that contact you take 3 Ice Damage, Slow 2, and have a 15% chance to Freeze.

name: Resonance
desc: When you cast a spell gain +1 Magic Damage for the rest of the turn.

name: Resonance2
desc: When you cast a spell gain +1 Magic Damage and +1 Damage for the rest of the turn.

name: LearnFromMe
desc: When you cast a spell, all allied cats gain that spell in their bonus slot.

name: LearnFromMe2
desc: When you cast a spell, all allied cats gain the upgraded version of that spell in their bonus slot.

name: LightningAspect
desc:
Electric immunity.
When you deal Electric Damage, gain +1 Charge.

name: LightningAspect2
desc:
Electric immunity.
When you deal Electric Damage, gain +1 Charge for each point of damage dealt.

name: LongCast
desc: Tile-targeted spells gain +3 Range.

name: LongCast2
desc: +1 Magic Damage. Tile-targeted spells gain +5 Range.

name: LightUptheStage
desc: At the end of your turn, Emit a Sparkle for each turn you've taken.

name: LightUptheStage2
desc: At the end of your turn, emit a Sparkle for each turn you've taken and gain +1 Kinetic Spikes .

name: ElementalAttunement
desc: Casting elemental spells imbues your basic attack with those elements and relevant effects for the rest of the battle.

name: ElementalAttunement2
desc:
Casting elemental spells imbues your basic attack with those elements and relevant effects for the rest of the battle.
Elemental spells cost -2 mana.

name: LatentEnergy
desc: When an ally spends mana, Gain +2 Magic Damage until the next time you use magic.

name: LatentEnergy2
desc: When an ally spends mana, Gain +2 Magic Damage until the next time you use magic, and gain +2 mana.

name: Five
desc: When you end your turn with exactly 5 mana, gain +5 [img:shield] and temporarily gain +5 Kinetic Spikes until the end of your next turn .

name: Five2
desc: When you end your turn with exactly 5 mana, gain +5 [img:shield], heal 5 HP and temporarily gain +5 Kinetic Spikes and +5 Damage until the end of your next turn.

name: MagicGuru
desc: Your allies have +1 Mana Regeneration. When an ally spends 7+ mana to cast a spell, they gain All Stats Up.

name: MagicGuru2
desc: Your allies have +1 Mana Regeneration. When an ally spends 7+ mana to cast a spell, they gain All Stats Up. When you spend mana, each ally gains +1 mana.

name: One
desc: When you end your turn, if you cast exactly 1 spell, double cast your next spell.

name: One2
desc: When you end your turn, if you cast exactly 1 spell, double cast your next 2 spells.

name: Two
desc:
When you end your turn, if you cast exactly 2 spells, gain +1 Bonus Attack.
When you end your turn, if you have exactly 2 mana, gain +1 Bonus Attack.

name: Two2
desc:
When you end your turn, if you cast exactly 2 spells, gain +1 Bonus Attack and Movement.
When you end your turn, if you have exactly 2 mana, gain +1 Bonus Attack and Movement.

name: Four
desc: When you end your turn, if you have exactly 4 mana, gain +1 [img:int] and +1 Magic Damage.

name: Four2
desc: When you end your turn, if you have exactly 4 mana, gain +1 [img:int], +1 Magic Damage, +1 Kinetic Spikes, and +1 Holy Shield.
